goal: Ensure DeepSeek strict tool-call arguments are validated before critical harness mutations and malformed calls are recordable as state failures.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- deepseek schema-check --name propose_edit --arguments '{"schema_version":999,"path":"src/main.rs","intent":42,"expected_effect":"bad","risk_level":"risky","extra":true,"verification_steps":["cargo test",123]}' --json
cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Strict schemas are listed, but malformed tool-call arguments can still become unstructured failures with no repair guidance or state evidence.
